books.title: Over and Under the Pond
books.author: Kate Messner
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book takes us on a trip to the pond alongside mother and son. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.

books.title: Bat Loves the Night
books.author: Nicola Davies
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book illuminates the life of a common but less-often-observed creature. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.

books.title: Winter Sleep: A Hibernation Story
books.author: Sean Taylor
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book takes readers on a winter walk with a boy and his grandmother. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.

books.title: A Fruit is a Suitcase for Seeds
books.author: Jean Richards
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book introduces students to the ways that plants use seeds. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.

books.title: Up in the Garden and Down in the Dirt
books.author: Kate Messner
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book takes us on a trip to the garden alongside a girl and her grandmother. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.

books.title: A House Spider's Life
books.author: John Himmelman
books.rationale: This beautiful picture book illuminates the life of a common, but often less appreciated, creature. It is a lovely addition to your bookshelf, but scheduling in the lesson plans is flexible for those using their library.
